phase_dir: (not a formal GSD phase — work lives on git branch design-system-foundation)

completed_tasks.name: theme.ts tokens: 7-step typography scale + tint colors (primaryTint/successTint/warningTint/errorTint/shadow); Badge consumes them
Extract DateField, TimeField, Chip primitives; refactor add-todo/add-appointment/log-symptom; fix PS-41 (save enabled with notes)

remaining_tasks.name: Extract layout primitives: ModalSheet (all modals), ScreenHeader (all tabs), EmptyState (todo/health/calendar), SegmentedControl (todo tabs + calendar toggle + login toggles)

Token sweep: replace hardcoded hex/#FFFFFF/fontSize literals app-wide with tokens + typography scale; reconcile week-detail.tsx off-brand palette (SYS-04); fix PS-53 (contraction timer corrupt mid-contraction save) and PS-01 (login due-date should use DateField)

blockers.description: Tasks 1-2 are automated-verified (typecheck clean, E2E 20/20) but NOT visually verified on device. The mood selector changed from emoji-forward tiles to horizontal Chip pills (PS-60) — needs the user's eyes / a decision on whether Chip needs a vertical variant.
blockers.workaround: Run `npx expo start --port 8081` on the branch (Expo Go works here; native-build switch was committed to main only) and check the 3 refactored modals.

human_actions_pending.action: Visually verify the 3 refactored modals on device (add-todo, add-appointment, log-symptom), especially mood-chip layout
Decide: accept horizontal mood chips (PS-60) or have Chip support a vertical layout variant before continuing Task 3

decisions.decision: Foundation-first sequencing: consolidate design system on this branch before building feature phases in parallel
decisions.rationale: parallel phase builders would each hardcode against drifting tokens and collide on shared files; user chose this option

decisions.decision: Foundation tasks run sequentially, not parallel
decisions.rationale: all touch shared files (theme.ts, components/ui); skill red-flag forbids parallel implementers

next_action: Get the user's call on the mood-chip layout (PS-60), then dispatch the Task 3 implementer (layout primitives) via subagent-driven-development with spec + quality review gates.
context_notes: Branch is 3 commits ahead of main and tree is clean (no WIP). IMPORTANT divergence: main's docs/ui-backlog.md was independently expanded (PS-60..PS-85, three P1s incl. setup-step-unreachable PS-61, contraction-timer invisible-Stop, journal-tab unreachable) while this branch's ui-backlog has a DIFFERENT PS-60 (mood-chip note). ui-backlog.md WILL merge-conflict — reconcile numbering when merging. The 3 P1s on main are real functional bugs worth folding into Task 4 or a separate pass. .planning/STATE.md and ROADMAP.md are stale (dated 2026-05-23) and predate all auth/foundation work.
